name: Athenian Pizza
recipeInstructions:
1. Heat 2 tablespoons oil in a large skillet over medium heat.
2. Add the diced eggplant, a little at a time, and cook until golden brown, adding more oil as needed.
3. Drain the eggplant on paper towels.
4. Add the red pepper and cook until tender-crisp. Drain on paper towels.
5. Separate the pita breads, pulling them apart into halves.
6. Arrange the halves on a baking sheet, cut sides up.
7. Spread 2 tablespoons spaghetti sauce on each pita bread half.
8. Top with some of the eggplant, red pepper, pepperoni, and onion slices.
9. Bake at 400°F for 5 minutes.
